## Summary

Describe the change in terms of user-visible behavior or contract impact.

## Validation

List the narrowest commands that demonstrate the change.

## Compatibility Impact

Describe any public API, metadata, reporter, or platform compatibility changes.

## Follow-up Risk

Call out any remaining risk, unsupported edge case, or intentional follow-up.

See [docs/pull-request-template.md](../docs/pull-request-template.md) for the
canonical review checklist and release-alignment guidance.
